title: Custom eggless cakes ready by 6am — only at Riverstone, North West Sydney
summary:
Riverstone Shopping Centre is open before most of Sydney has finished their coffee. From 6am weekdays, we're here — custom eggless cakes ready for pickup on your way anywhere.

For Marsden Park, Schofields, and Rouse Hill families who can't find a custom eggless bakery nearby, that's what this store was built for.

100% eggless across all 15 flavours. No exceptions, no egg-free versions, no checking required. Any design — buttercream, fondant, or ganache. Photo references welcome.

48 hours minimum notice. Starts at $39.99 for a 6-inch. Order via WhatsApp: +61 425 697 725.
keywords: custom eggless cake Riverstone Marsden Park
no eggless custom bakery Schofields Rouse Hill
